ddls:
CREATE TABLE "libraries" (
  "library_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each library */,
  "library_name" TEXT /* Name of the library */,
  "version" TEXT /* Version of the library */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the library */,
  "release_date" TEXT /* Date when the library version was released */,
  "deprecation_date" TEXT /* Date when the library version was deprecated */,
  "license" TEXT /* License under which the library is distributed */,
  "repository_url" TEXT /* URL to the repository where the library is hosted */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("library_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "classes" (
  "class_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each class */,
  "class_name" TEXT /* Name of the class */,
  "fullpathname" TEXT /* Full path and name of the class file */,
  "library_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the library the class belongs to */,
  "label" TEXT /* Label or category of the class (e.g., Information Holder, Service Provider) */,
  "layer_number" TEXT /* Layer number indicating the architectural layer of the class */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date and time when the class was first created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Date and time when the class was last updated */,
  "is_deprecated" INTEGER /* Boolean flag to indicate if the class is deprecated */,
  "dependencies" TEXT /* JSON field to store dependencies of the class */,
  "documentation_url" TEXT /* URL to the documentation for the class */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("class_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_classes_library_id FOREIGN KEY ("library_id") REFERENCES libraries ("library_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_classes_layer_number FOREIGN KEY ("layer_number") REFERENCES layers ("layer_number"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_classes_label FOREIGN KEY ("label") REFERENCES labels ("label_name")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "user_name" TEXT /* Full name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., developer, project manager, admin) */,
  "password_hash" TEXT /* Hashed password for the user */,
  "last_login" TEXT /* Date and time of the user's last login */,
  "is_active" INTEGER /* Boolean flag to indicate if the user account is active */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "access_logs" (
  "access_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each access event */,
  "class_id" INTEGER /* ID of the class being accessed */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user accessing the class */,
  "access_date" TEXT /* Date when the class was accessed */,
  "access_type" TEXT /* Type of access (e.g., view, edit) */,
  "ip_address" TEXT /* IP address from which the access occurred */,
  "user_agent" TEXT /* User agent string of the client accessing the system */,
  "is_successful" INTEGER /* Boolean flag to indicate if the access was successful */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("access_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_class_id FOREIGN KEY ("class_id") REFERENCES classes ("class_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "labels" (
  "label_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each label */,
  "label_name" TEXT /* Name of the label (e.g., Information Holder, Service Provider) */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the label */,
  "is_deprecated" INTEGER /* Boolean flag to indicate if the label is deprecated */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date and time when the label was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Date and time when the label was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("label_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "layers" (
  "layer_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each layer */,
  "layer_number" TEXT /* Layer number (e.g., 3.4) */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the layer */,
  "is_deprecated" INTEGER /* Boolean flag to indicate if the layer is deprecated */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date and time when the layer was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Date and time when the layer was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("layer_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "projects" (
  "project_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each project */,
  "project_name" TEXT /* Name of the project */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the project */,
  "lead_user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the lead user for the project */,
  "start_date" TEXT /* Date when the project started */,
  "end_date" TEXT /* Date when the project is expected to end */,
  "status" TEXT /* Status of the project (e.g., active, completed, on hold) */,
  "budget" TEXT /* Budget allocated for the project */,
  "actual_cost" TEXT /* Actual cost incurred for the project */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("project_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_projects_lead_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("lead_user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "project_libraries" (
  "project_library_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each project-library association */,
  "project_id" INTEGER /* ID of the project */,
  "library_id" INTEGER /* ID of the library */,
  "usage_status" TEXT /* Status of library usage in the project (e.g., active, deprecated) */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date and time when the association was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Date and time when the association was last updated */,
  "notes" TEXT /* Additional notes or comments about the library usage in the project */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("project_library_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_project_libraries_project_id FOREIGN KEY ("project_id") REFERENCES projects ("project_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_project_libraries_library_id FOREIGN KEY ("library_id") REFERENCES libraries ("library_id")
)
